hostPort.title: Host and Port
hostPort.description: Base URL for the DataLens UI (optional, used for source links).

iamToken.title: IAM Token
iamToken.description: IAM token for DataLens API access.

organizationId.title: Organization ID
organizationId.description: Organization ID for DataLens API access.

pageSize.title: Page Size
pageSize.description: Page size for pagination in API requests. Default is 100.

collectionNamePattern.title: Collection Name Pattern
collectionNamePattern.description: Substring match for collection name. When set, only dashboards from matching collections are ingested.

onlyDashboardsInCollections.title: Only Dashboards In Collections
onlyDashboardsInCollections.description: When enabled, ingest only dashboards that belong to a collection (directly or via workbook).

requestDelaySeconds.title: Request Delay (seconds)
requestDelaySeconds.description: Minimum delay between API requests to avoid rate limiting.

rateLimitRetrySeconds.title: Rate Limit Retry (seconds)
rateLimitRetrySeconds.description: Delay before retrying after a rate limit response.

rateLimitMaxRetries.title: Rate Limit Max Retries
rateLimitMaxRetries.description: Maximum retries after rate limit responses.

verifySSL.title: Verify SSL
verifySSL.description: Boolean marking if we need to verify the SSL certs for DataLens. Default to True.

dashboardFilterPattern.description: Regex to exclude or include dashboards that matches the pattern.
dashboardFilterPattern.title: Default Dashboard Filter Pattern

chartFilterPattern.description: Regex exclude or include charts that matches the pattern.
chartFilterPattern.title: Default Chart Filter Pattern

dataModelFilterPattern.description: Regex exclude or include data models that matches the pattern.
dataModelFilterPattern.title: Default Data Model Filter Pattern

projectFilterPattern.description: Regex to exclude or include projects that matches the pattern.
projectFilterPattern.title: Default Project Filter Pattern
